nasb.text: His father-in-law, the girl’s father, detained him; and he remained with him three days. So they ate and drank and lodged there.

esv.text: And his father-in-law, the girl’s father, made him stay, and he remained with him three days. So they ate and drank and spent the night there.

cnv.text: 那人的岳父，就是女子的父親，強留那人，那人就與他同住了三天；他們一起吃喝，在那裡住宿。

ccb.text: 留他在家里小住。他便在那里住了三天，一起吃住。
